title: Real-life 'X-Files' investigator who ran UFO program dies at 60 after cancer battle
description: A famous UFO expert, dubbed a real-life 'X-Files investigator, has died following a battle with cancer.

title: Are we alone? Study shows N.Y. among states with highest UFO sightings
description: Researchers recently analyzed data available on the National UFO Reporting Center’s website. Here's what they found.

title: UFO nebo „záhadné drony“ nad Jihočínským mořem
description: Co si o tom myslíte? Na videu je vidět 9 světel, poté se z nich stane formace 12 světel, nejbližší objekt zmizí a poté... Článek UFO nebo „záhadné drony“ nad Jihočínským mořem se nejdříve objevil na AC24.cz .

title: Mystery Over 8 Missing or Dead Experts Linked To UFO Research
description: “This has had a real chilling effect,“ said one congressman.

title: UFO Expert Nick Pope Dead at 60
description: Sad news for the UFO community ... Nick Pope -- known as the real-life version of "The X-Files" character Fox Mulder -- has died after battling cancer. His wife, Elizabeth Weiss, confirmed her husband had passed in their Tucson, AZ home on Monday,... Permalink
